description: Portable distilled map of an external cognitive archive. It is planning context, not full authority.

read_depth_policy.CAPSULE: Only this distilled capsule was read. May orient planning, cannot authoritatively alter MML/context/tools.
read_depth_policy.BODY: The exact source body was read. May become procedure or prompt section if transduced.
read_depth_policy.BODY_PLUS_REFS: Body plus referenced docs/tools/evals were read. May enter MML with diagnostic status.
read_depth_policy.E2E: Pattern was exercised in a generated Lab, test, cycle or UI/runtime trace.
